headlines.title: How the Federal Reserve's rate decision impacts student loan interest rates
How the Federal Reserve shapes consumer loan rates
Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq drop as chip stocks sink on OpenAI report, oil rises
Edison (EIX) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
Ultra Clean (UCTT) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
NeoGenomics (NEO) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
Erste Group Upgrades Applied Materials (AMAT) on AI-Driven Semiconductor Investment
Texas Capital raises Slide Insurance stock price target on strong earnings
Consumer prices rose 3.3% in March, as energy prices spiked due to Iran conflict
headlines.desc: The consumer price index was expected to show a 3.3% year-over-year gain in March, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

headlines.title: Fed Governor Waller says Iran war and labor market risks are keeping central bank on hold
headlines.desc: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller on Friday said current economic conditions are complicating the approach to interest rates.

headlines.title: Buying chip stocks is getting pricey. Traders don't care
headlines.desc: The VanEck Semiconductor ETF (SMH) tracking the sector is up more than 30% this month.

headlines.title: Hormuz blockade could deepen world’s worst energy crisis — and risk a dangerous misstep
headlines.desc: The U.S. naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz threatens to halt more tanker traffic, sending oil surging and risks drawing China into a widening confrontation with Washington.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts prefer these dividend stocks for steady income
headlines.desc: Given ongoing uncertainty, investors may seek to add some stability to their portfolios by buying dividend stocks for steady income.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts are bullish on these 3 stocks for the long haul
headlines.desc: Picking stocks can be challenging due to the vast universe of equities. Investors can follow the ratings of top Street analysts and make informed decisions.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts pick these 3 dividend stocks for reliable income
headlines.desc: Those looking for a stable stream of passive income amid uncertainty can add stocks of some well-established dividend-paying companies to their portfolios.

headlines.title: Iran oil shock stirs memories of 1997 Asian Financial Crisis — but here’s why history may not repeat itself
headlines.desc: The Hormuz disruption is hammering Asian economies with surging energy costs and weakening currencies, but a repeat of the crisis three decades ago is unlikely.

headlines.title: Inflation held sticky at 3% as U.S. headed into war with Iran, key Fed gauge shows
headlines.desc: The gauge released Thursday offers the Federal Reserve a snapshot of conditions leading into the Iran war.

headlines.title: 'CAR' crash: Avis Budget stock plunge reminding some on Wall Street of GameStop
headlines.desc: Shares of Avis Budget Group, ticker 'CAR,' soared from under $100 last month to a record high near $850 in early trading Wednesday before a sharp U-turn lower intraday.

headlines.title: Iran war live: Trump urges Tehran to ‘give up’; Ghalibaf mocks US strategy
headlines.desc: Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf ridicules US's economic pressure campaign as oil prices surge and Hormuz standoff continues.

headlines.title: The King and Queen in the Big Apple: What the royals did on their third day in the US
headlines.desc: After visiting the 9/11 Memorial, Queen Camilla read to children at the New York Public Library and King Charles visited a community organisation in Harlem.

headlines.title: Why Alphabet’s stock is the standout gainer on Big Tech’s monster earnings day
headlines.desc: Alphabet’s earnings beat and strong cloud growth are helping to justify raised spending projections.

headlines.title: More diners are eating at Chipotle despite higher prices, bucking Wall Street’s concerns about restaurants
headlines.desc: Shares of Chipotle jumped 6.2% after hours on Wednesday, after the company managed to eke out a surprise same-store sales gain for the first quarter.

headlines.title: Oil prices soar on fears of long supply disruption, US siege of Iran ports
headlines.desc: US President Trump meets with oil firms over ways to minimise impact on fuel supplies amid US blockade of Iranian ports.

headlines.title: Christchurch mass killer loses bid to overturn conviction
headlines.desc: White supremacist Brenton Tarrant's appeal is "utterly devoid of merit", a New Zealand court has ruled.

headlines.title: New Zealand court denies bid by mosque mass shooter to appeal conviction
headlines.desc: Brenton Tarrant shot dead 51 Muslim worshippers, including children, at two Christchurch mosques in 2019.

headlines.title: Pakistan opens up road trade routes into Iran amid Hormuz blockade
headlines.desc: With shipping disrupted by US-Iran tensions, Islamabad activates overland corridor to move stranded cargo into Iran.

headlines.title: Why Morgan Stanley shifted its call on Federal Reserve rate cuts after the FOMC meeting
headlines.desc: Core inflation is too sticky for the Fed to ease and it’s likely to remain that way until events in the Middle East stabilize, says Morgan Stanley.

headlines.title: Oil prices climb to four-year high above $120 after report that Trump is considering further military action in Iran
headlines.desc: Oil jumps on report President Donald Trump will be briefed later on Thursday on plans to strike Iran

headlines.title: Oil price hits highest since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options
headlines.desc: Axios reported that US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of "short and powerful" strikes on Iran.

headlines.title: Wholesale prices rose 0.5% in March, much less than expected despite war impact
headlines.desc: The producer price index was expected to increase 1.1% in March, according to the Dow Jones consensus estimate.
